# NOW — <sprint name>

## Orientation
> Rewritten each sprint closeout. The single source of current state. Read this first.
> **Last rewritten: YYYY-MM-DD**
>
> ⚠️  This block is load-bearing. It is the only current-state context loaded automatically
> at every session start. If it is stale, every session starts wrong. Write it accurately.

**Phase:** <rung status — e.g. "Rung 1 complete · Rung 2 in progress · arXiv pending">

**Active bet:** <which bet is being tested — Bet 1 / 2 / 3>

**Live results:** <key numbers with honest caveats — copy from CLAIMS.md CAN CLAIM>
- <result 1>
- <result 2>

**Cannot claim:** <2-3 line summary of the most important CANNOT CLAIMs>

**Decisions binding this sprint:** <#N (one-liner) · #N (one-liner)>

**Docs needed this sprint:** <which Tier 2/3 docs are relevant — be specific>

> Updated every session end. Non-negotiable.
